message:
fix(color): handle negative hue values in from_hsv

Use rem_euclid instead of % operator for hue normalization. Rust's %
preserves sign, so -30.0 % 360.0 = -30.0 instead of the expected 330.0.
This caused incorrect color calculations for negative hue values.

Added comprehensive test coverage for HSV conversion including negative
hues, hues > 360, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
